Title: Valid login shows welcome
Steps:
Open the home page
Type admin into the Username field
Type secret into the Password field
Click the Log in button
Confirm the page shows the welcome message

Title: Invalid login shows error
Steps:
Open the home page
Type admin into the Username field
Type wrongpass into the Password field
Click the Log in button
Confirm an invalid credentials error is shown

Title: Wrong password must not pass as welcome
Steps:
Open the home page
Type admin into the Username field
Type wrongpass into the Password field
Click the Log in button
Confirm the welcome message appears

Title: Missing button triggers self-heal gate
Steps:
Open the home page
Click the Save changes button
Confirm the Sign in heading is visible
